title: piptocarpha elaeagnoides
intro: Piptocarpha elaeagnoides, also known as the False Sage, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The leaves and stems of this plant are used in traditional medicine, possessing anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Piptocarpha elaeagnoides include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and diuretic. Herbal preparations of Piptocarpha elaeagnoides often involve the use of its leaves and stems in teas, infusions, and topical applications.
